summary: Iteration 27: UX/Logic Changes Testing - Backend 13/13 PASSED, Frontend tabs and features verified with one critical bug found

ui_bugs.issue: React 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error in console when navigating tabs - indicates infinite loop in useEffect

action_items: FIX: React 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error - likely in AimmhHubPage.jsx useEffect dependencies (lines 200, 227 per eslint warnings)
NOTE: Route is /chat not /hub - /hub returns blank page (no route defined)
critical_code_review_comments: React useEffect dependency warnings in AimmhHubPage.jsx (lines 200, 227) - CLAUDE_MD_CONTEXT is outer scope value causing unnecessary re-renders
RegistryManager.jsx line 67 has missing dependency 'fetchRegistry' in useEffect

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All tabs render, one console error

test_credentials.note: Fresh users registered for each test session via /api/auth/register with username field, returns access_token

context_for_next_testing_agent: Route is /chat not /hub. Auth returns access_token not token. React infinite loop error in console needs investigation in AimmhHubPage.jsx useEffect hooks.

details.test_batch_run_disallows_roleplay_stage: PASS - Returns 422 for batch run with roleplay stage
details.test_roleplay_run_requires_roleplay_stag: PASS - Returns 422 for roleplay run without roleplay stage

details.all_7_tabs_present: PASS - Claude.md, Registry, Instances, Batch Runs, Roleplay Runs, Chat, Synthesis
details.create_account_cta: PASS - Create account button shows confirmation dialog for guests
details.guide_chat_toggle: PASS - Guide chat toggle button present
details.chat_tab_content: PASS - Multi-chat panel, recipient list, prompt carousel, send button all present
details.synthesis_tab_content: PASS - Synthesis queue, run controls, instruction input, history section all present
details.batch_runs_tab: PASS - Pipeline builder for non-roleplay batch pipelines
details.roleplay_runs_tab: PASS - Pipeline builder for roleplay sequences (DM/player style)
details.registry_tab: PASS - Registry tree with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google providers

features_verified: Backend: /api/payments/summary returns free max_instances=5 and daily limits (25 chats, 5 batch, 2 roleplay)
Backend: /api/v1/hub/runs enforces batch vs roleplay validation (422 for invalid combinations)
Backend: Guest access works with X-Guest-Id header
Frontend: Hub has 7 dedicated tabs including Batch Runs and Roleplay Runs
Frontend: Chat tab shows prompt carousel with lock-to-stack behavior (max 3)
Frontend: Chat tab has 'Send to synthesis' action on responses
Frontend: Synthesis tab shows queue from Chat, supports remove and checkbox selection
Frontend: Synthesis history default is session-only with save option for authenticated users
Frontend: Create account CTA shows confirmation dialog before navigation
Frontend: Registry tab shows all providers with non-archived instances

pricing_page_verification.free_tier_limits_displayed: Max 5 active instances, Max 3 saved personas, Max 1 connected BYOK key, 25 chats per 24h, 5 batch runs + 2 roleplay runs per 24h
